summary: Completed Tasks 1-2: Created predict_conflicts MCP tool handler, registered in server.ts, updated test counts, and created comprehensive test suite (18 tests, all passing).
learnings: Graph package dist was stale -- needed `npm run build` (tsup) not `tsc --build` since package.json exports point to tsup-bundled .mjs/.js
Integration test tool count was already behind (42 vs 44 in server.test.ts) -- corrected to 45 to match actual total
